With the Winter Olympics in full swing, the United States are one of the top countries with the most medals at 14 (as of this writing). Events are competitive and heated, while curling, a ice and stone competition, has emerged as one of the most popular sports during the winter games. Curling takes place at the Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium in Cortina d’Ampezzo, Italy. Check out a complete schedule of the event here . watch 2026 Winter olympics: curling on Peacock When Does Winter Olympics: Curling Events Start ? Curling continues until the men’s gold medal final on Saturday, Feb. 21 at 1:05 p.m. ET/10:05 a.m. PT on CNBC, and women’s gold medal final on Sunday, Feb. 22 at 5:05 a.m. ET/2:05 a.m. PT on Peacock . Additionally, you can catch highlights and recaps daily during NBC’s Primetime in Milan coverage starting at 8 p.m. ET/PT. Men’s and women’s curling are available to watch live and stream on demand.
